title: Nonlinear Estimation Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative steps involved in estimating nonlinear time series models, highlighting the feedback loop for model improvement.
relationships: Process begins with Observed Time Series Data which informs the initial model specification. The Parameter Estimation Algorithm uses the data and initial specification to compute parameters. The results are fed into a Check Model Fit & Diagnostics step. If diagnostics fail, the process loops back to revise the model specification. If diagnostics pass, the process concludes with a Final Estimated Model.
